title: Linear Algebra
description: Linear Algebra is a branch of mathematics that deals with the study of linear equations, vector spaces, and linear transformations. It provides a fundamental framework for solving systems of equations and representing linear relationships between variables.

modules.title: Vector Spaces
modules.description: This module introduces the concept of vector spaces, including definitions, properties, and operations.

subtopics.title: Definition of a Vector Space
subtopics.description: What constitutes a vector space and its key properties
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and define a vector space

subtopics.title: Vector Operations
subtopics.description: How to perform addition and scalar multiplication in a vector space
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can perform basic vector operations

subtopics.title: Properties of Vector Spaces
subtopics.description: Key properties of vector spaces, including commutativity and distributivity
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can apply properties of vector spaces to solve problems

subtopics.title: Subspaces
subtopics.description: How to identify and work with subspaces of a vector space
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and work with subspaces

modules.title: Linear Transformations
modules.description: This module introduces the concept of linear transformations, including definitions, properties, and applications.

subtopics.title: Definition of a Linear Transformation
subtopics.description: What constitutes a linear transformation and its key properties
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and define a linear transformation

subtopics.title: Properties of Linear Transformations
subtopics.description: Key properties of linear transformations, including linearity and injectivity
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can apply properties of linear transformations to solve problems

subtopics.title: Kernel and Image of a Linear Transformation
subtopics.description: How to find and work with the kernel and image of a linear transformation
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can find and work with the kernel and image of a linear transformation

subtopics.title: Invertible Linear Transformations
subtopics.description: How to identify and work with invertible linear transformations
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and work with invertible linear transformations

modules.title: Matrices and Determinants
modules.description: This module introduces the concept of matrices and determinants, including definitions, properties, and applications.

subtopics.title: Definition of a Matrix
subtopics.description: What constitutes a matrix and its key properties
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and define a matrix

subtopics.title: Matrix Operations
subtopics.description: How to perform addition, multiplication, and inversion of matrices
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can perform basic matrix operations

subtopics.title: Definition of a Determinant
subtopics.description: What constitutes a determinant and its key properties
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can identify and define a determinant

subtopics.title: Properties of Determinants
subtopics.description: Key properties of determinants, including expansion by minors and cofactor expansion
subtopics.learning_objective: After this, the learner can apply properties of determinants to solve problems
